[[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] '''Nanda''' was in charge of security of the [[Nonessential Equipment Storage and Disposal Facility 456]] on [[Sirpar/Legends|Sirpar]]. A grizzly veteran, their true intent was to retire.

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|2|You're in the Army Now!|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
